positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a celestial woodland creature, combining elements of a majestic owl, a gentle deer, and stardust. The creature is perched on glowing, oversized mushrooms in a dark forest clearing, surrounded by neon-blue and emerald-green bioluminescent flora. The composition should be centrally focused, featuring bold, clean silhouettes against a high-contrast, deep indigo and sapphire background. Use a clean, flat graphic novel style with crisp lines and graphic depth, optimized for apparel printing. High level of detail, cinematic lighting, hyper-detailed texture mapping, vector art style.
negative: blurry, out of focus, noise, grain, text, watermark, logo, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, low resolution, bokeh, signature, artist name, copyright, realistic photography, messy
